final:
// // This module implements a reset controller with an active-low reset signal. When the reset signal is high, the output is set to a default value. When the reset signal goes low, the output follows the input value.
module reset_controller(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 8'b00000000; // Default value on reset
        end else begin
            data_out <= data_in; // Follow input when not in reset
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a reset controller with an active-low reset signal. When the reset signal is high, the output is set to a default value. When the reset signal goes low, the output follows the input value.
